title: PluginHider
description: A simple plugin that helps you hide your server plugins from players...
body:
![PluginHider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/730922554b04335dbe2a4dd5b6071a25d9815992.jpeg)

---

**PluginHider** is a lightweight plugin for **Minecraft servers** designed to enhance server privacy and security by restricting access to plugin information. It prevents unauthorized players from using commands such as **/plugins** or **/pl**, ensuring that only users with the appropriate permissions can view the list of installed plugins.

When a player without the required permission attempts to execute these commands, PluginHider blocks the request and displays a message indicating that they do not have permission to view the server's plugins. This helps server administrators protect sensitive information about their server setup and reduces the risk of players identifying or targeting specific plugins.

PluginHider is built to be simple, efficient, and easy to configure. With minimal setup required, server owners can quickly control who is allowed to view plugin information while maintaining a cleaner and more secure server environment.

Whether you're running a private server or a public community network, PluginHider provides a straightforward solution for keeping your server's plugin configuration hidden from unauthorized users.

---
